old-fashioned-rice-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Old-fashioned Rice Pudding

ingredients.item: 350 ml  leite gordo ou meio gordo

instructions: Light a pot with the lemon peel, cinnamon stick, water and a pinch of salt. When you start boiling, add the rice, stir and let it cook.
When it starts to dry, add the milk to boil and stir. Let cook for about 5 minutes, then add the sugar and wait for about 3 minutes.
Remove from the fire, discard the cinnamon stick and lemon peel and lie down in a deep dish or bowl. Decorate to taste with cinnamon powder.

olive-oil-cake-with-raisin-marmellata-an.name: Olive Oil Cake With Raisin Marmellata And Crème Fraîche

ingredients.item: Powdered sugar and whipped crème fraîche

instructions: Combine Vin Santo, lemon zest and juice, Grand Marnier, salt, and ⅓ cup water in a medium bowl; scrape in seeds from vanilla bean and toss in pod. Set aside.

Bring granulated sugar and ⅓ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Boil, swirling pan occasionally and brushing down sides with a wet pastry brush, until caramel turns a deep amber color, 10–12 minutes. Remove from heat and carefully add reserved Vin Santo mixture (caramel is extremely hot and will bubble vigorously), leaving vanilla pod behind. The caramel will tighten up after liquid is added; return pan to medium heat and cook, stirring often, until smooth, about 5 minutes.
Pour sauce over raisins and let stand until raisins are plump, about 20 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Marmellata can be made 1 week ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.
Preheat oven to 350°. Coat a 9”-diameter cake pan with nonstick spray and line with a round of parchment paper; coat parchment. Whisk flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
Whisk eggs and granulated sugar in a large bowl, just to blend. Whisk in oil, milk, and Madeira. Whisk in dry ingredients until batter is smooth. Scrape into prepared pan; smooth top.
Bake until golden brown and a tester inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 40–45 minutes. Let cake cool on a wire rack before turning out.
Dust with powdered sugar and serve with a spoonful of marmellata and whipped crème fraîche.

omelet-recipe-with-mushrooms-and-feta-ch.name: Omelet Recipe With Mushrooms And Feta Cheese
omelet-recipe-with-mushrooms-and-feta-ch.original_name: Receta de omelette con setas y queso feta

ingredients.item: 100 g of fresh mushrooms (cut into sheets)

instructions: Beat the eggs into a bowl with force to mix them well. Add a pint of salt and pepper.
Warm a frying pan preferably nonstick to medium heat and add butter. When melting, add laminated mushrooms and skip them for about 3-4 minutes until they are tender and golden.
If you choose to wear spinach, add them to the frying pan with mushrooms and cook for another minute till they are moved.

Put the scrambled eggs into the frying pan with mushrooms (and spinach if you used them) and let them cook without moving them. Wait till the edges start tipping and the centre's still a little liquid.
It scatters Feta cheese minced into small pieces, or broken with your fingers, about half the omelette.
With a spatula, carefully fold the other half of the omelette onto the pilling and cook another minute so that everything will be well melted and delicious.
Sirve el omelette en un plato, ponle con perejil fresco y a disfrutar.

one-pot-cajun-chicken-rice.name: One Pot Cajun Chicken & Rice

ingredients.prep: to taste, extra for seasoning chicken

instructions: Rub chicken breasts with olive oil and then the cajun spice mix (store-bought or homemade)
Sear the chicken breasts on each side for about 2 minutes, then remove from the pan.
Add some more oil and fry the onions and peppers until softened.
Add the black beans and fry for a couple of minutes. Add the rice and fry for a further minute.
Place the chicken back on and cover in chopped tomatoes.
Add chicken stock and more cajun spice (to taste).
Bring to boil, then cover and simmer for 25 minutes.
Enjoy!

one-pan-beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry.name: One-pan Beef And Broccoli Stir-fry
instructions: Mix together all sauce ingredients in a small bowl.
Heat oil over a nonstick pan and add beef stirring until brown.
Pour sauce in pan and stir to coat meat.
Once the sauce is bubbling, add the veggies to the pan and stir again to coat.
Cook until meat is cooked through and veggies are soft.
Serve over rice or alone.
Enjoy!

orange-flower-pavlovas-with-strawberries.name: Orange-flower Pavlovas With Strawberries
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 135°C. Line large baking sheet with parchment paper. Using cookie cutter or glass as aid, trace six 2 1/2-inch circles on parchment, spacing 2 to 3 inches apart; turn parchment over.

Using electric mixer, beat egg whites in large bowl until soft peaks begin to form. With mixer running, gradually add 6 tablespoons sugar. Whisk 2 tablespoons sugar and cornstarch in small bowl. With mixer running, gradually beat sugar-cornstarch mixture into meringue. Continue beating meringue until stiff glossy peaks form. Beat in vinegar and orange-flower water. Divide meringue among parchment paper circles, spreading to fill completely (meringues will be about 1 1/2 inches high). Using back of spoon, form slight depression in center of each meringue.

Bake meringues until beige and dry to touch, about 20 minutes. Turn off oven and prop door open slightly with wooden spoon. Let meringues cool in oven until completely dry, about 1 hour. Transfer to rack to cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Puree all ingredients in blender until smooth. Transfer to bowl. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix strawberries, 1 tablespoon sugar, and orange-flower water in medium bowl. Let stand at room temperature until sugar dissolves and juices form, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes.

Using electric mixer, beat chilled cream, vanilla, and remaining 1 teaspoon sugar in another medium bowl until soft peaks form. DO AHEAD Strawberries and whipped cream can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover separately and chill. Stir strawberry mixture and rewhisk cream just before using.

Spoon small dollop of whipped cream in center of each plate. Place 1 meringue atop whipped cream on each plate, pressing lightly to anchor meringue. Spoon generous dollop of whipped cream in center of each meringue. Spoon coulis around meringues; top with sliced strawberry mixture.

oreo-pie.name: Oreo Pie
instructions: Beat milk and pudding mix together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until thick and smooth, about 2 minutes. Add crushed cookies; stir to combine.
Refrigerate pudding mixture until partially set, about 10 minutes.
Spread pudding mixture into baked pie crust; top with whipped topping.

oven-baked-chicken-with-tomato-paste-rec.name: Oven Baked Chicken With Tomato Paste Recipe

ingredients.item: But or pillar (different flavor and cooking time)
Hindi but or sky (for larger portions)
Karnaut or brocoli (Light and low calorie option)
Posted in Sauce Blends (e.g. bbq Sauce, ketchup and mustal mixture)
Bitter pepper sauce or butter pü mixed with honey
Red pepper or spice mixture instead of pepper

instructions: 1. Eat potatoes in the ring or cube in shape, chop onions, clean and slice the vegetables.
2. Wash and dry chicken
3. Mix Salça, ketchup, olive oil, salt, pepper and cake.
4. Put chickens into inner and wait for 10 minutes.
5. Directory of potatoes, onions and mushrooms to the tray, & place chickens on the floor.
6. Pour the remaining sauce.
7. Look at 40–45 minutes in oven heated from 200 degrees.
8. You can add a small amount of water or olive oil to the chicken and vegetables in the island.
9. From the oven fry fortune hot chickens.
10. You can add rice or salad to the side.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

overnight-oats-with-coconut-dates-almond.name: Overnight Oats With Coconut, Dates, Almonds, And Honey
instructions: Stir honey, coconut oil, and apple cider vinegar in a small bowl or small measuring cup until smooth (if mixture looks broken, warm gently in a microwave and stir until smooth). Add dates, almonds, coconut, and salt and stir to combine.
Divide oats and yogurt among bowls, spooning yogurt into centers. Top with coconut mixture.
Do Ahead: Coconut mixture can be made 4 days ahead; cover and chill. Rewarm gently before serving.

owl-eggs-lezzet.name: Owl Eggs
instructions: 1. Leave the eggs to be solid and cool.
2. Cut down the shells and cut a thin piece from the bottom.
3. Cut and carefully cover in the form of zigzag leaving 2 cm from the top.
4. Remove the yellow and accumulate in a bowl.
5. On yeast, mustard, blind, onion, salt and powder add red pepper.
6. Fill the mixture into eggs and close it on the cover.
7. Fine slice olives and paste it on the yellows.
8. Cut small triangle parts from red pepper and create the nose of chicks.
9. Take the broods and serve plate.
10. Place civciv eggs among broods.
11. 11. Make flowers from red pepper and sprinkle on the tab.
